text: Standing here, I am enveloped by the quiet anticipation of discovery. The glass walls separate me from an illuminated, creative space beyond—a room saturated in blue and purple light, promising knowledge waiting just out of reach. The fire safety equipment beside me grounds me in the practicalities of existence, even as curiosity stirs within. I feel a sense of wonder and readiness, on the cusp of crossing into a space dedicated to research and thought. There is a blend of seriousness and excitement—a laboratory of ideas that beckons me inward.
